title: Multi-Fuzzy Complex Nilpotent Matrices
journal: International Journal of Fuzzy System Applications
abstract: In this paper, the concept of multi-fuzzy matrix (MFM), multi-fuzzy complex matrix (MFCM), generalized multi-fuzzy complex matrix (GMFCM), generalized multi-fuzzy complex nilpotent matrix (GMFCNM) are introduced and have shown that the set of GMFCMs form a distributive lattice. Some properties and characterizations for GMFCNMs are established and in particular, a necessary and sufficient condition for an n × n GMFCNM to have the nilpotent index n is given. Finally, the reduction of GMFCNMs over a distributive lattice are given with some properties.
